text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 421 

TIER_ID 

LABEL: Tier Number 

DESCRIPTION: Medicare Part D formulary tier identifier. This field represents the cost sharing tier in which the 
product was placed in the sponsor's formulary. This identifier is also a key that links a Part D sponsor's 
cost sharing tier record to a prescription drug event record via contract ID, plan ID, and tier ID. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
